Swiggy preview

Swiggy turns inspiration into action in one tap.

This prototype shows a mobile-first food discovery experience where users browse cooking inspiration, save interests, watch short-form content, and instantly order ingredients from Instamart.

Use MP4 (H.264/AAC) or WebM files in the videos folder for best compatibility.
  • Discover recipes and creators through short video content.
  • Personalize the experience by saving interests.
  • Move from inspiration to shopping without leaving the flow.
Open live prototype View source
